message:
test(server): cover /health/durability route (#94 regression net)

Three unit tests for the runtime-verdict endpoint added in 32b76765:

- returns 200 with the documented body schema (`durability_state`,
  `allows_reads`, `allows_writes` all present) for :memory: DBs,
- rejects non-GET methods with 405,
- bypasses bearer auth like /health and /healthz do, so k8s-style
  supervisors can probe it without holding the server's bearer token.

Exercises the same route-dispatch path that #94 uses to surface silent
durability-state transitions to external supervisors; a regression on
any of these (wrong status, missing field, auth gate leak) is now a
compile-time discovered failure rather than a "noticed three months
later" one.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
